nasb.text: The rod and reproof give wisdom, But a child who gets his own way brings shame to his mother.

esv.text: The rod and reproof give wisdom, but a child left to himself brings shame to his mother.

cnv.text: 杖責和管教能使人有智慧， 放縱的孩子使母親蒙羞。

ccb.text: 管教之杖使孩子得智慧， 放纵的子女让母亲蒙羞。

csbs.text: 杖打和责备，能带来智慧； 放任的孩子，使母亲蒙羞。
